title: Crispy Bihon Pancit Stir Fry
description: A classic Filipino stir-fry dish made with pancit bihon noodles, vegetables, and your choice of protein. This recipe is a quick and easy take on the traditional dish.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced snow peas and grated carrots, and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the pancit bihon noodles to the skillet or wok, and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are heated through.
Add the fromage blanc, salt, and pepper to the skillet or wok, and stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the fromage blanc is melted and the noodles are well coated.
Serve the pancit bihon hot, garnished with chopped green onions and crispy garlic if desired.
